reviews.review_description: Game doesn’t open and says theres not enough memory to run

Decent concept done really terribly. Out of sync notes, terrible graphics, deafining audio, the works. A game very similar but done more refined is smash drums, also available through app lab.

I think this game has alot of potential and it does seem that with a lot of refining and tweaking this game could come out really fun, but it's not quite ready yet.

I don't know why i left the review originally but most of my complaints are gone, it's clear to see if you hit the notes now, it brings me back to my very vague memories of playing rock band, this game is delightful and i'm gonna probably learn how to get better at it, it's amazing that the devs are listening to feedback and making the game better!

developer_response.body: I'm glad you like the changes I'm making to the game :D ! I will continue to improve it, so feedback is truly important to me.

reviews.review_description:
It’s rare to come by a game that is so bad where when you say “it’s free” is not a compliment. 

But it does have one good saving quality, it holds 4 year olds attentions for longer than 3 minutes…

A basic children-pixart guitar hero with 5 songs. This is free so only I can say thanks.
If that had more songs, modes and more damage for enemies when you play well or something.. have potencial for being better. Now is like an early beta game.

This experience is a little rough around the edges. It works and the concept is good. A rhythm  game demo. I think the dev should continue to work on it or take the skills learned to keep growing. A good start to a potential vr dev career.

This is a really neat rhythm game idea, but hot dang man ya gotta at the very least sync the notes up with the music. They always come WAY too early, where honestly my first playthrough I thought you were just throwing random notes at me and they had nothing to do with the music.

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting me know! Some out of sync notes should be fixed with the latest update

reviews.review_title: It's not triple A but it's good
reviews.review_description: Nice game, I had fun playing it, give it a chance. The extra modes makes it interesting expecially the monster punching one, if he plans to continue to update, I see a lot of promise in the idea. Either way little data, fun. I recommend.

developer_response.body: Glad you like modifiers :D I will continue to update the game, there's a lot to improve

reviews.review_title: Not sure if this is for me
reviews.review_description: I tried it and it was kinda messy to me. Though maybe I just don’t understand.😹 but not going to throw in the towel. I really enjoy the art style of the game, and everything esthetically, and already got the hang of it.
